message:
Eliminate all schema↔type drift: 12→0 known drifts

Align remaining 8 JSON schemas with stabilized Rust types:
- wa-robot-reserve: flat fields→nested reservation object
- wa-robot-workflow-abort: remove extra fields, add message
- wa-robot-rules-list: packs hierarchy→flat rules array with RuleItem fields
- wa-robot-rules-test: detections→matches, input_length→text_length, add match_count
- wa-robot-accounts: add total/service/pick_preview, flatten account to AccountInfo
- wa-robot-accounts-refresh: accounts_updated→refreshed_count, add service/accounts
- wa-robot-workflow-run: remove policy/result/steps, add step_index/elapsed_ms/message
- wa-robot-workflow-status: remove step_logs/action_plan/wait_condition, add plan/created_at

Update typed_client_integration.rs: empty known_drift_schemas (0 entries),
add schema_match_test! for all 8 fixed schemas. All 63 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -111,40 +111,7 @@ fn validate_required_fields_present(data: &Value, schema: &Value, schema_name: &
 ///
 /// Each entry maps schema_file -> brief description of drift.
 fn known_drift_schemas() -> BTreeMap<&'static str, &'static str> {
-    BTreeMap::from([
-        (
-            "wa-robot-rules-list.json",
-            "Schema uses packs/total_rules; Rust uses rules[]",
-        ),
-        (
-            "wa-robot-rules-test.json",
-            "Schema uses detections/input_length/elapsed_us; Rust uses matches/text_length/match_count",
-        ),
-        (
-            "wa-robot-accounts.json",
-            "Schema uses last_refresh; Rust uses total/service",
-        ),
-        (
-            "wa-robot-accounts-refresh.json",
-            "Schema uses accounts_updated/changes; Rust uses refreshed_count/accounts",
-        ),
-        (
-            "wa-robot-reserve.json",
-            "Schema uses flat pane_id/reservation_id; Rust uses nested reservation object",
-        ),
-        (
-            "wa-robot-workflow-run.json",
-            "Schema uses steps_planned/policy_decision; Rust uses step_index/message",
-        ),
-        (
-            "wa-robot-workflow-status.json",
-            "Schema uses step_logs/action_plan/context; Rust uses plan/created_at/message",
-        ),
-        (
-            "wa-robot-workflow-abort.json",
-            "Schema uses cleanup_performed/aborted_at; Rust uses message (not in schema)",
-        ),
-    ])
+    BTreeMap::new()
 }
 
 // ============================================================================

 // Drift detection — document and freeze known schema↔type mismatches

     let known = known_drift_schemas();
-    let expected_count = 8;
+    let expected_count = 0;
     assert_eq!(
         known.len(),
         expected_count,

@@ -14,50 +14,21 @@
       "type": "boolean",

     },

+      "description": "Whether abort was forced (--force flag, skips cleanup)"

       "type": "string",
       "description": "Name of the workflow that was aborted"

-      "type": "boolean",

-    },
-    "aborted_at": {
-      "type": "integer",

-      "description": "Unix timestamp (ms) when abort was recorded"

       "type": "string",
-      "description": "Why the abort failed (present when aborted=false)",
-      "enum": ["not_found", "already_completed", "already_aborted", "already_failed"]

     }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
